exception.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of Microsoft Edge WebDriver only supports Microsoft Edge version 136 Current browser version is 144.0.3719.115 with binary path C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe Host info: host: 'INLEN8520080540', ip: '10.27.254.236' Build info: version: '4.29.0', revision: '5fc1ec94cb' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.5' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: MicrosoftEdge, ms:edgeOptions: {args: [], binary: C:\Program Files (x86)\Micr..., extensions: []}}]}]
